codeReview.summary: The reviewed commit does not implement the parity improvement gate feature. It only reclassifies simple-price freshness findings in the divergence registry and regenerated diff report, while the actual gate implementation lives outside this commit. Because the assigned feature requires adding and validating the final before/after gate, the reviewed feature commit does not cover the required behavior.

issues.description: The reviewed commit only adds expected-divergence entries for simple/token price freshness gaps; it does not add the required before/after improvement gate logic, CLI wiring, or report generation for comparing baseline vs current diff reports.

The reviewed commit only regenerates the diff report to downgrade freshness findings from actionable to expected. This changes the current report inputs, but does not implement the feature requirement to prove improvements came from resolved issues rather than reclassification or divergence-registry drift.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The compatibility-hardening worker transcript claims the before/after improvement gate implementation was reviewed and validated, but the referenced commit only contains divergence-registry/diff-report edits. The skill/handoff process does not guard against reporting success for a feature when the final commit no longer contains the claimed gate implementation files.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff references commit b9e575687b13b314bdf27ce1a64c12d23ca07cf6 as implementing `src/coingecko/improvement-gate.ts`, `src/jobs/report-coingecko-improvement-gate.ts`, and `tests/parity-improvement-gate.test.ts`, but `git show b9e575687b13b314bdf27ce1a64c12d23ca07cf6 --stat` shows only `data/coingecko-snapshots/divergence-registry.json` and `data/coingecko-snapshots/replay/diff-report.json` changed.

summary: Fail: the assigned feature was not actually implemented in the reviewed commit. The commit only reclassified simple/token price freshness diffs as expected, so it cannot satisfy the required parity improvement gate behavior or its anti-reclassification guarantees.
